name: Fang Yuyang
title: Research / 研究方向
bio:
I'm Yuyang, a PhD student at Zhejiang University. I've published research in human-computer interaction and social robotics, focused on building AI systems that help people communicate and learn.

Currently, I'm working on domestic robots and social robots for children with autism. Beyond my research, I'm passionate about finding and trying tools that can change how we live and work, from efficiency tools and embodied systems to wearable devices and agent-assisted trading.
